message:
feat(frankenterm-web): add paste input events, scrollback search, and clipboard docs

Paste input support:
- Add PasteInput struct and Paste variant to InputEvent/InputEventJson
- Wire paste through VT encoder with bracketed paste mode support
- Replace serde_json-based to_json_string() with a hand-rolled
  zero-allocation JSON encoder, eliminating serde_json from the WASM hot
  path (return type changes from Result<String, serde_json::Error> to
  Result<String, Infallible>)

Scrollback search subsystem:
- Add SearchConfig, SearchMatch, and SearchIndex types in scroll.rs with
  build()/build_wrapped() constructors, next/prev navigation with
  wrapping, and Unicode NFKC normalization for correct composed vs
  decomposed character matching
- Expose search to JS via setSearchQuery/searchNext/searchPrev/
  clearSearch/searchState WASM bindings in wasm.rs
- Auto-rebuild search index on buffer changes (grid resize, font change,
  cell writes) via refresh_search_after_buffer_change()
- Integrate search highlight with selection overlay -- user selection
  takes priority over search highlight via active_selection_range()

Scroll viewport navigation:
- Add jump_to_line() method on ScrollState for navigating to a specific
  scrollback line (clamped, centered)

Build and docs:
- Add wasm-opt = ["-Oz", "--all-features"] for Rust 2024 compatibility
- Add unicode-normalization dependency
- Document clipboard integration (copy/paste) in getting-started.md

Includes tests for paste JSON roundtrip, VT bracketed paste encoding,
empty/case-insensitive/Unicode search, soft-wrap boundary matching,
next/prev wrapping, selection override, and 100k-line stress test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,11 @@ readme = "../../README.md"
 [lib]
 crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
+[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.release]
+# wasm-pack bundles an older wasm-opt; Rust 2024 wasm output requires explicit
+# feature enabling to avoid validation failures.
+wasm-opt = ["-Oz", "--all-features"]
+
 [features]
 default = []
 
@@ -21,6 +26,7 @@ ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0.145"
+unicode-normalization = "0.1.24"
 
 [target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies]
 js-sys = "0.3.85"

@@ -114,6 +114,10 @@ export function TerminalCanvas() {
 - Forward normalized DOM input with `term.input(...)`.
 - For ftui-driven rendering, call `term.applyPatch(patch)` followed by `term.render()`.
 - For ANSI-stream mode, call `term.feed(data)` followed by `term.render()`.
+- Clipboard integration (browser-safe flow):
+  - Copy: call `term.copySelection()` and write the returned text via `navigator.clipboard.writeText(...)` inside a trusted user gesture.
+  - Paste: read text from a DOM `paste` event (`event.clipboardData`) and call `term.pasteText(text)` (or `term.input({ kind: "paste", data: text })`).
+  - Chrome/Safari/Firefox all gate clipboard APIs behind user gesture/permission rules, so keep clipboard read/write in host JS.
 
 Minimal keyboard event forwarding example:
